description: REPO may only be used by one agent at a time
TEST_ENV may only be used by one agent at a time
BUILD_SERVER may only be used by one agent at a time
Interface change in data models requires notification to all dependent developers
TEST_WRITER cannot begin until feature code is complete and stable
REVIEWER must approve code before merge
CI_RUNNER on BUILD_SERVER must pass after each merge before next merge proceeds
REVIEWER approves code or requests changes
CI_RUNNER passes or fails; failure requires developer to fix regression
Implement -> test write in TEST_ENV -> review -> merge to REPO -> CI pass on BUILD_SERVER (sequential pipeline)
Hold-and-wait: DEVELOPER_A holds REPO waiting for REPO access, DEVELOPER_B holds REPO waiting for REPO access
